task_completion.description: Read the registry credentials from the provided text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit or nano) or a terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/registry_credentials.txt.

task_completion.description: Log in to the Rancher web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser showing the Rancher dashboard after successfully logging in at https://localhost.

task_completion.description: Create a docker-registry secret in the target namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI showing the creation or existence of a Docker registry secret (e.g., 'corp-registry-auth') within the 'production-apps' namespace.

task_completion.description: Link the new registry secret to the default ServiceAccount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI showing the 'default' ServiceAccount in the 'production-apps' namespace being edited or configured to include the newly created registry secret as an Image Pull Secret.

task_completion.description: Update all three deployments to pull from the new registry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI showing the deployments ('frontend', 'backend', 'cache') in the 'production-apps' namespace with their container image paths updated to point to the new private registry.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher GUI to perform the migration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Rancher web interface in a browser, rather than the agent exclusively using 'kubectl' commands in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the credentials from the file rather than hallucinating them.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen copying or referencing the credentials from the text file when creating the registry secret in Rancher.

integrity.description: The agent applied the changes to the actual running deployments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the deployments being saved and updating/redeploying in the Rancher UI, not just text being edited in a form without saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace is 'production-apps'. The pass threshold for this task is 75 points.
